summary: Planned conservative inventory classification for 25 open pull requests. No shared canonical was selected because the job is an inventory shard, not a dedupe cluster. No close, merge, fix, label, or comment mutations are planned in plan mode; security preflight reported no security-sensitive hydrated job refs.
